title: SuperSonic unit 01 thread dig up
wikitext:
[]: SuperSonic unit 01 thread dig up             Quote Post by Jibe » Fri Oct 27, 2017 5:04 pm Hi. I saw this closed thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7813/Super-Sonic-Unit-01/forum.evageeks.org/thread/7813/Super-Sonic-Unit-01/ Well I think it's simple maths: A 2 meter human max speed is 35km/h So a 80 meter eva beeing 40 times taller runs 40 times faster. 35 x 40 = 1400 km/h. Over supersonic speed. Does it make sense?

[]: Re: SuperSonic unit 01 thread dig up             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 27, 2017 7:01 pm Well, the shock waves would sure be noisy. Or you can just intone ‘rubber physics’ and move on. The idea of a sonic boom accompanying a running Eva amuses me, though.
